chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Sale of Pasture, Crops, Trees, Lands, Servants, Water Rights, and Real Estate

text: 3868 - وَ سَأَلَهُ سَمَاعَةُ : عَنْ رَجُلٍ يُزَارِعُ بِبَذْرِهِ فِي اَلْأَرْضِ مِائَةَ جَرِيبٍ مِنَ اَلطَّعَامِ أَوْ غَيْرِهِ مِمَّا يُزْرَعُ ثُمَّ يَأْتِيهِ رَجُلٌ آخَرُ فَيَقُولُ لَهُ خُذْ مِنِّي نِصْفَ بَذْرِكَ وَ نِصْفَ نَفَقَتِكَ فِي هَذِهِ اَلْأَرْضِ لِأُشَارِكَكَ قَالَ "لاَ بَأْسَ بِذَلِكَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3868 - Sama'ah asked him about a man who cultivates one hundred jaribs of crops, whether food or other plants, using his own seeds. Then another man comes to him and says, "Take half of my seeds and half of my expenses for this land so that I may share the partnership with you."
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in that."
